title: Biomeless Villager Enchantments
description: Make every Librarian villager offer the same kind of trades in any biome. All enchanted books can show up at random (Mending, Silk Touch, Unbreaking, Fortune, Swift Sneak, and more).
body:
# Unified Librarian Trades (Minecraft Java 1.21.x)
Make every Librarian villager offer the same kind of trades in any biome. All enchanted books can show up at random (Mending, Silk Touch, Unbreaking, Fortune, Swift Sneak, and more).

### What this pack does
- Removes biome‑specific Librarian trades.
- Uses one unified pool of random enchanted books for all Librarians.
- Works with new and existing worlds on Minecraft Java 1.21.x.
- No mods required.

### How to use
- Create or find a Librarian (place a Lectern next to an unemployed Villager).
- Their book trades will now be picked from the full enchantment pool, regardless of biome.
- If you want to refresh a Librarian’s trades, remove their Lectern so they lose the job, then give it back.

### Notes
- This datapack focuses on a simple, consistent trading experience. Pricing and trade amounts aim to feel close to vanilla.
- Free to use and tweak in your personal worlds.
